steps.title: Substitute for y
steps.content:
The first equation gives $y=4x+1$. Substitute that into $4y=15x-8$:
$$4(4x+1)=15x-8$$

steps.title: Compute x minus y
steps.content:
$$x-y=-12-(-47)=35$$
Subtracting a negative adds, which is why the result is positive.

steps.title: Check with Desmos
steps.content: Graph $y=4x+1$ and $4y=15x-8$. The intersection is $(-12,-47)$, so $x-y=35$.
